items.name: SahiRent
items.description: SahiRent shows real rent prices paid by actual tenants in Delhi, Noida, Gurgaon & Delhi NCR. Check if your rent is fair, find 1BHK/2BHK/3BHK flats, compare locality rents, lookout for flatmates plan your locality according to your budget No brokers. No ads. Just honest data.

items.name: Orange Slice
items.tagline: Automate any sales task with AI
items.description: Build go-to-market workflows with AI. Prospect, enrich, qualify, and automate GTM execution in Orange Slice.

items.name: Jet AI Agents
items.tagline: Build business AI agents in minutes
items.description: Jet AI Agents is the AI builder that lets teams create business apps and AI agents on top of 200+ tools — without code. Work with agents like teammates directly in Slack, WhatsApp, or Telegram. Marketing, sales, operations, and support teams use Jet to build AI agents, AI workflows, and apps that don’t just display data — they take action. Teams use Jet to automate the workflows that matter most. AI agents your team will trust — because they built them themselves.

items.name: Logic
items.tagline: Build and operate fleets of agents
items.description: Shipping a real AI agent can mean weeks of wiring up prompts, retries, eval harnesses, and logging before you see production. Logic solves that. You write a structured spec that describes what the agent should do, and Logic gives you a fully managed agent, with evals, observability, model routing and more built in, ready to be called from anywhere.

items.name: Waitlister
items.tagline: The waitlist software to launch your product
items.description: Build a viral waitlist in minutes. Free landing pages, referral system, and email automation — no code required. Start free, no credit card needed.

items.name: VIDEO AI ME
items.tagline: Create videos with AI actors that sound and look real
items.description: Create stunning AI videos with realistic actors. A selfie, a prompt, a product photo, a script, a reference clip, feed the platform anything and get ads, explainers, talking content, courses, shorts ads and viral content in 70+ languages.

items.name: Atech
items.tagline: Snap-together electronics built from a chat
items.description: Hardware is still built with processes that are 10-100 years old. Software got layers of abstraction decades ago while hardware never did. Atech is Lego for real electronics. Snap modules together, describe what you want it to do, and we generate the firmware. Idea to working device in minutes. No datasheet deep-dives, no soldering, no wondering "why doesn't it work?"

items.name: Brew Finder
items.tagline: Discover the best coffee shops to work at around you
items.description: Discover the best coffee shops around you. Check real-time crowd levels, seat availability, WiFi quality, and power availability.

items.name: GitBar
items.tagline: Every pull request, one menubar. GitHub, GitLab & Azure
items.description: GitBar is the macOS menubar app for pull requests. Connect GitHub, GitLab (cloud or self-hosted), and Azure DevOps across any number of accounts, and every PR you care about is one click away. See what's yours, what's waiting on your review, and what's happening across your team. Status badges show approved, draft, conflicts, and checks at a glance. A live PR count lives in your menubar. Built with React Native for macOS. Free on the Mac App Store.

items.name: Odyssey-2 Max
items.tagline: Physical accuracy takes a leap in world models
items.description: Odyssey-2 Max is Odyssey’s largest general-purpose world model yet, built for real-time interactive simulation. It uses autoregressive next-state prediction to improve physical accuracy, long-horizon stability, and open-ended interaction across worlds that evolve with user actions.

sample_reviews.text: He estado batallando con abrir el app, le presiono y no abre al contrario me cierra la aplicación   Que esta pasando
I bought iXpenseIt Pro several years ago and now am being forced to subscribe.
Was a great app, I paid for pro yet I’m somehow not grandfathered into cloud back ups (which cost the dev nothing since it uses iCloud). Now it just harasses me to pay for syncing every 10 min.

Apparently, if you were to accidentally tap on an old backup file (I was aiming for a PDF file next to that), it doesn't ask you if you intended to do a backup, no 'Tap Yes to proceed' prompt whatsoever, nope! It went straight to replacing my entire ixpenseit database with that old file in 1 second.
